name: area-intelligence
description: Repo-local PlotDNA plugin for locality resolution and fallback workflow guidance.

interface.shortDescription: PlotDNA locality and map-link fallback workflows.
interface.longDescription: Keeps PlotDNA's locality parsing, short-link resolution, reverse geocoding, and nearest-area fallback behavior consistent across frontend and backend changes.
defaultPrompt: Improve PlotDNA map-link fallback without breaking graceful degradation.
Audit locality resolution across the frontend and backend.
Refine nearest-area fallback for uncovered coordinates.
